description: Perform a rebranding update on the Software Requirements Specification (SRS) for 'DataSync Pro' by editing /home/ga/Documents/DataSync_SRS_v2.3.docx. Throughout the document, replace 'DataSync Pro', 'DS Pro', and 'DataSync' (standalone) with 'CloudBridge Enterprise', and replace 'Nextera Solutions' with 'CloudBridge Inc.' On the title page, update 'Version: 2.3' to 'Version: 3.0' (ensuring section numbers like 2.3 remain unchanged) and update the date 'June 15, 2024' to 'January 15, 2025'. Save the updated document as a new file at /home/ga/Documents/CloudBridge_SRS_v3.0.docx without overwriting the original.
